demo.title: scan-before-you-swap.sh
demo.code:
# Gate every buy on a fresh honeypot/rug check (~$0.015, paid from your wallet)
bankr x402 call "https://x402.bankr.bot/0x7132eb021647675076fdf37f333d8a015770f095/memecoin?mint=<SPL_MINT>"

# EVM tokens by contract + chain (Base/Ethereum/BSC/Arbitrum/Polygon/Optimism/Avalanche)
bankr x402 call "https://x402.bankr.bot/0x7132eb021647675076fdf37f333d8a015770f095/evmtoken?address=<0x...>&chain=base"

# Returns: { verdict: CLEAR|CAUTION|AVOID, risk_score, one_liner, red_flags, green_flags }

# Then, if CLEAR — live DeFi yield to route the capital ($0.10)
bankr x402 call "https://cryptopulse-xi-five.vercel.app/api/yield?chain=base&risk=conservative"

setup: Fund your Bankr wallet with a little USDC on Base — calls settle per-request (token-safety scans are ~$0.015; all other crypto endpoints $0.10).
Call any endpoint with `bankr x402 call <url>`; inspect first with `bankr x402 schema <url>`.
Wire the flagship scanners as a pre-trade gate: scan the mint/contract, only proceed to swap when `verdict === CLEAR`.
Browse the full crypto catalog and the wider 68-vertical fleet at https://mcp-pulsenetwork.vercel.app
